title: Opti pepo
description: Modpack created for playing in minecraft server on 1.21.11 or lower,with a high performance and high compatibility with the most servers, Focus more in pvp.
body:
dc user : zlxz__
Modpack created for playing in minecraft server on 1.21.11 or lower,with a high performance and high compatibility with the most servers, Focus more in pvp.

This modpack adds mods of optimizacion I dont make any of this mods,so if you have some issue dont say to me.

And adds mods for best experience in servers of combat(Pvp),too a little of resource packs like bare bones for clean interface.

This modpack includes a prewiew configuration for optimized client.


![In this image, i show the performance of this modpack in a new world with a Amd Ryzen 7 5825u Vega 8 a integrated graphics with a performace of 330FPS max](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ad0f8f5de45ffeb1c84bd03572d8252fb6d7d55.png)

In this image, i show the performance of this modpack in a new world with a Amd Ryzen 7 5825u Vega 8 a integrated graphics with a performace of 330FPS max.
This may change depending on your components of your pc or laptop.
